rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.194 governs a summer career and technology education grant program and does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 29.194. SUMMER CAREER AND TECHNOLOGY EDUCATION GRANT PROGRAM. (a) From funds appropriated or available for the purpose, the commissioner, in cooperation with an appropriate private entity, shall establish a grant program to provide funding to school districts for career and technology education courses offered during the summer.
_note: No textual nexus between proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
